reviews.comment:
Dolores como una reseña historica el ACA sigue llevando adelante el recreo o descanso del conductor del vehiculo actualmente motorizado. Es un lugar de paso especialmente de la costa marplatense y CABA. El objetivo es la carga de combustible y relevamiento de aire en las ruedas etc. Posee un hermoso parque con mesas y restaurante dode se puede comer un rico asado. Tambien esta el servicio de fast food, con multiples opciones y quiosco de alternativas dulces y bebidas como cafe y gaseosas.

(Translated by Google)
Dolores, as a historical note, the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) continues to provide a rest and recreation area for drivers of motorized vehicles. It's a popular stop, especially for those traveling from the Mar del Plata coast and Buenos Aires. The purpose is to refuel and check tire pressure, among other things. It boasts a lovely park with tables and a restaurant where you can enjoy a delicious barbecue. There's also a fast-food service with a variety of options and a kiosk selling sweets and beverages like coffee and soft drinks.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRalA3R2FREAE

reviews.comment:
No fue una experiencia afortunada. Es grande, comoda con todos los servicios. Hay bastantes surtidores pero lamentablemente poco personal!! Vinimos fantastico por la ruta y todo el tiempo que ganamos, lo perdimos haciendo cola para cargar combustible. Con tan poco personal se formaron colas interminables. Una pena.

(Translated by Google)
It wasn't a pleasant experience. The station is large and comfortable, with all the amenities. There are plenty of pumps, but unfortunately, very few staff! We had a fantastic drive, but all the time we saved was lost waiting in line for fuel. With so few staff, the lines were endless. A real shame.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBLTdhbU13EAE
